steps.t: Hauntreek can be found in the ruins of Nuiharn, north-west of Haerondir. Collect hauntreek for Rhadrog.
Burn the hauntreek you collected in the braziers found around Haerondir. The hauntreek will cause the fire to burn a strange blue colour.
Rhadrog can be found in Haerondir. You should speak with Rhadrog.
